allow: Bash(node_modules/.bin/tsx -e "import mongoose from 'mongoose'; import * as dotenv from 'dotenv'; dotenv.config\(\); await mongoose.connect\(process.env.MONGODB_URI||'mongodb://localhost:27017/merris'\); const col = mongoose.connection.db.collection\('kb_dense_embeddings'\); const modules = await col.distinct\('module'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(modules.sort\(\)\)\); await mongoose.disconnect\(\);")

Bash(node_modules/.bin/tsx -e "import mongoose from 'mongoose'; import * as dotenv from 'dotenv'; dotenv.config\(\); await mongoose.connect\(process.env.MONGODB_URI||'mongodb://localhost:27017/merris'\); const col = mongoose.connection.db.collection\('kb_dense_embeddings'\); const modules = await col.distinct\('module'\); console.log\(modules.sort\(\).join\('\\n'\)\); await mongoose.disconnect\(\);")

Bash(node -e "const mongoose = require\('mongoose'\); require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); mongoose.connect\(process.env.MONGODB_URI||'mongodb://localhost:27017/merris'\).then\(async \(\) => { const docs = await mongoose.connection.db.collection\('kb_dense_embeddings'\).distinct\('module'\); console.log\(docs.sort\(\).join\('\\n'\)\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const v = process.env.VOYAGE_API_KEY; const q = process.env.QDRANT_URL; console.log\('VOYAGE_API_KEY:', v ? v.slice\(0,8\)+'...' : 'MISSING'\); console.log\('QDRANT_URL:', q || 'MISSING'\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\({path:'.env'}\); const v = process.env.VOYAGE_API_KEY; const q = process.env.QDRANT_URL; console.log\('VOYAGE_API_KEY:', v ? v.slice\(0,8\)+'...' : 'MISSING'\); console.log\('QDRANT_URL:', q || 'MISSING'\);")
